incident_summary: In-process pH of batch A5635B measured 4.1 — below validated range lower limit of 5.3 during granulation. Batch held pending investigation.
root_cause_detail: Purified water used for granulation fluid had transient low pH of 5.4 due to CO2 absorption from environmental exposure after storage tank vent filter change.
corrective_action: Batch rejected. Water system investigated — vent filter replaced and water re-qualified. pH specification for WFI tightened. Batch manufacturing process fully reviewed.
preventive_action: In-line pH monitoring of WFI at point of use — alert at pH 5.8, process stop at pH 5.5. Vent filter change now triggers WFI re-qualification before manufacturing use.
effectiveness_check: WFI pH within specification for 12 months on daily monitoring log. Zero pH-related granulation failures.
